codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 5270811 against the feature spec and validation contract coverage for block rendering. The 5 server block components are implemented at the expected paths and satisfy required behaviors (layout, responsive rules, overlays/fallbacks, empty-item handling, and next/image usage). No blocking or non-blocking implementation defects were identified in this feature commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The nextjs-worker skill requires manual visual verification for UI features (start dev server and verify), but this worker session only shows lint/build verification and no interactive check command. This suggests either a skill adherence gap or overly strict wording in the skill procedure.

summary: Feature block-components passes scrutiny: implementation matches expected block-component behavior and contract assertions assigned to this feature; no code defects found.
